Careers / FY26 graduate intake

Work that matters here.

320 colleagues running services for 85,000 residents. Career pathways across planning, finance, digital, parks, libraries, community development, and more. We pay properly, we train people, and we mean it about work–life balance.

How we hire

Three steps. No surprises.

Council recruitment is conducted under merit-based principles. Every position is open to all eligible applicants and assessed against the same criteria.

Step 1

Apply online.

Submit your CV and a short response addressing the selection criteria. We acknowledge every application within two business days.

Step 2

Panel interview.

A 45-minute interview with the hiring manager and one independent panel member. Plain questions, no role-play, no whiteboard tests.

Step 3

References & offer.

Reference checks, then a written offer including salary, allowances, super, study support, and start date. Decisions within ten business days.

Metro Council WA

Delivering local government services to 85,000 residents across 12 suburbs in inner and middle Perth.

Metro Council WA acknowledges the Whadjuk people of the Noongar nation as the Traditional Custodians of the lands on which we work, and we pay our respects to Elders past and present.
